publicationstmt.publisher: Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections

profiledesc.creation: This finding aid was produced using ArchivesSpace on 2021-04-05 23:21:47 UTC.

change.item: This resource was modified by the ArchivesSpace Preprocessor developed by the Harvard Library (https://github.com/harvard-library/archivesspace-preprocessor)

repository.corpname: Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections

did.abstract: Records of the national organization. Includes flower judging contest records and photographs, 1978-1986, and copies of Lotus Leaflets (newsletter).

defitem.label: Contact Information:
defitem.item: Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections 2B Carl A. Kroch Library Cornell University Ithaca, NY 14853 (607) 255-3530 Fax: (607) 255-9524 rareref@cornell.edu http://rmc.library.cornell.edu

scopecontent.head: COLLECTION DESCRIPTION
scopecontent.p: Records of the national organization. Includes flower judging contest records and photographs, 1978-1986, and copies of Lotus Leaflets (newsletter).

prefercite.head: Cite As:
prefercite.p: Pi Alpha Xi records, #4379. Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections, Cornell University Library.

did.unittitle: Applicatin to Establish a Chapter of Pi Alpha Xi at the University of Tennessee, Knoxville
Petition to Establish Chapter at Texas Tech
Petition for California Polytechnic State University
Pi Alpha Xi History at WSC [Washington State College])
Membership list A-F and deceased members (Rolodex cards)
Second and Third Place Award Certificates
Letters and Minutes to K. Sanderson (copies)
Employee ID# PAX, Tax Exempt File (old) [for interest bank account]
PAX Mailing List: Chapters, Board of Directors
Flower Judging Awards brochure & Miscellaneous Flower Judging Information
PAX: Membership & Lotus Leaf from Ken Sanderson
Doug Needham's Mac Files (transferred to CD)
Terri Starman's IBM Files (transferred to CD)
